2605.20269.title: Catching a Moving Subspace: Low-Rank Bandits Beyond Stationarity
2605.20269.paper_summary: Many bandit deployments (recommendation, clinical dosing, ad targeting) share two facts prior work handles only in isolation: rewards live on a low-dimensional latent subspace, and that subspace drifts. Stationary low-rank bandits exploit rank but break under subspace change; non-stationary linear bandits adapt to drift but pay ambient rate $\widetilde{O}(d\sqrt{T})$. We study piecewise-stationary low-rank linear contextual bandits with scalar feedback: $θ_t = B_k^\star w_t$ with rank-$r$ factor $B_k^\star\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times r}$ constant within each of $K$ unknown segments and able to shift at boundaries. Our results are tight along three axes. (i) Identification boundary. With single-play scalar rewards, the moving subspace is recoverable through quadratic functionals of rewards iff three probe-side conditions hold: known noise variance, bounded state-noise coupling, and full-dimensional probe support. Each is necessary in the unrestricted-second-moment problem, and jointly they are sufficient, characterizing the boundary of the solvable region. (ii) Algorithm and dynamic regret. SPSC interleaves isotropic probes with windowed projected ridge-UCB exploitation inside the learned $r$-dimensional subspace; a CUSUM-style variant discovers segment boundaries online. The costed dynamic regret is $\widetilde{O}(r\sqrt{T})+\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})+O(W\,V_{\mathrm{in}})$, replacing the ambient $d\sqrt{T}$ rate with the intrinsic rank. (iii) Empirics. On eleven benchmarks spanning synthetic, UCI/MovieLens, semi-synthetic clinical, and ZOZOTOWN production-log data, SPSC outperforms non-stationary and low-rank baselines whenever $d-r\gtrsim T^{1/6}$, matching the analytical crossover. To our knowledge, this is the first work to characterize the identification boundary and attain the intrinsic-rank dynamic-regret rate in this setting.
2605.20269.paper_summary_zh: 許多強盜部署（推薦、臨床劑量、廣告定位）共享兩個事實，之前的工作僅在孤立中處理：獎勵位於低維潛在子空間中，且該子空間會漂移。靜態低秩強盜利用秩但在子空間變化時失效；非靜態線性強盜適應漂移但需支付環境速率 $\widetilde{O}(d\sqrt{T})$。我們研究具有標量反饋的分段靜態低秩線性上下文強盜：$θ_t = B_k^\star w_t$，其中秩為$r$的因子 $B_k^\star\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times r}$ 在$K$個未知段內保持不變，並能在邊界處變化。我們的結果在三個軸上是緊湊的。（i）識別邊界。對於單次遊玩標量獎勵，移動子空間可以通過獎勵的二次泛函來恢復，當且僅當三個探測側條件成立：已知噪聲方差、有界狀態-噪聲耦合，以及全維度探測支持。每一條件在不受限的二次矩問題中都是必要的，並且它們共同足以表徵可解區域的邊界。（ii）算法和動態遺憾。SPSC 將各向同性探測與在學習到的$r$維子空間內的窗口化投影脊-UCB 利用交錯；一種CUSUM風格的變體在線發現段邊界。計算的動態遺憾為 $\widetilde{O}(r\sqrt{T})+\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})+O(W\,V_{\mathrm{in}})$，用內在秩替換了環境 $d\sqrt{T}$ 的速率。（iii）實證。在涵蓋合成、UCI/MovieLens、半合成臨床和 ZOZOTOWN 生產日誌數據的十一個基準上，當 $d-r\gtrsim T^{1/6}$ 時，SPSC 超越了非靜態和低秩基準，與分析交叉點相匹配。據我們所知，這是第一項在此設置中表徵識別邊界並達到內在秩動態遺憾速率的工作。
2605.20269.author: Hamed Khosravi et.al.
